name_cn:
Premium 🔥🔥
BY THE WAY zip-top Boston tote, double-hand carry design, accented with a plaque. Features two interior pockets, two compartments separated by a divider, and an additional pocket. Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap. Made of calf leather. Palladium-finish metal hardware. Dimensions 28*15*13
Style: 2303
